name: zenlayer-ai-gateway
description: pi (pi-coding-agent) provider extension for the Zenlayer AI Gateway — an OpenAI-compatible gateway fronting OpenAI, Anthropic, GLM, Kimi, DeepSeek, Qwen, Grok, Gemini, MiniMax, and Perplexity. Auto-discovers models from /v1/models.
author: Marko Stankovic <m@marko.la>
